findings.summary: F2.B: sentence ends with dangling preposition (e.g. "In Ahjan's framework, the path begins with.")

evidence.snippet:
r internal state. The body has it built in.

This

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: So when you deliberately widen yours, you tell your system that this is not that kind of emergency.
After you do the hard thing, notice that you are still here.
This is not about ignoring real mistakes.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: Your worth is not riding on how the brave thing turns out.
It is the ground you stand on, present before the attempt and unchanged by how it turns out.
The risk shrinks to its true size when you see that your worth was never the thing being staked.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: You live in a system that has taught you specific lessons about the cost of visibility.
The protective mechanism taught you to calculate the cost of visibility.
The mechanism taught you that the cost is real.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: The cost of the suppressed courage is that you pay for the action you never take.
The cost is that you remain haunted by the words you never spoke.
The cost is that you wonder forever what would have happened if you had been brave.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: The mechanism is complete: fragmentation becomes the baseline.
Here is the place where staying small and growing larger diverge.

Pearl_Editor + Pearl_Writer (re-pace per §7.3 dwell contract — insert a dwell beat after each named insight; §13 criterion #13)
